prompt:
A refined sepia-toned illustration in the style of an ancient Chinese scholarly portrait fused with modern AI branding, on aged parchment paper with visible grain and ink-wash texture. Centered is a half-body portrait of a curly-haired male scholar inspired by Democritus, seated behind a wooden desk and wearing layered traditional robes in muted blue-gray and brown with intricate trim. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular block in a brown skin-tone color, creating an anonymized or redacted look. He holds 1 calligraphy brush upright in his right hand, while his left hand rests on the table. In the upper center-right, place the Claude logo with a rust-orange sunburst emblem and the word “Claude” in dark serif lettering. On the upper left, add a large vertical title in Chinese, “德米斯圖”, with 1 vertical column of smaller Chinese calligraphy text beside it reading: “以語言為媒，理解為舟，助人洞見，推動協作，造福人類，安全可信，通往更美好的未來。” Add a smaller vertical signature line on the far left reading “甲辰春寫” with 2 red seal stamps below it. The background shows a classical Chinese landscape painting with distant mountains, a small pavilion on a cliff, mist, and dense bamboo leaves framing the upper right and right edge, plus dark pine branches on the lower left.

The wooden desk fills the lower third and contains exactly 8 distinct object groups: 1 brush pot holding 4 brushes on the left, 1 stack of 4 stitched books with Chinese titles on the spines reading “人工智慧概論”, “機器學習原理”, “負責任的 AI”, and “對齊與價值觀”, 1 ink stone or ink dish near the center-left, 1 central parchment diagram sheet, 1 small dark cube seal near the bottom left with Chinese characters on two visible faces, 1 framed placard on the right, 1 rolled scroll at the bottom right, and 1 tabletop surface with visible wood grain. The central parchment diagram should show a circular node labeled “AI 安全 Safety” connected to 6 surrounding nodes labeled “準確”, “可靠”, “有益”, “透明”, “對齊”, and “隱私”, with delicate cloud motifs around the diagram. The framed placard on the right should read “AI 安全原則” as a header and list 4 bullet points in Chinese: “減少災難性風險”, “尊重人類價值觀”, “確保系統可控”, and “促進長遠福祉”. The rolled scroll at the bottom right should display the phrase “以謹慎之心 創造未來”.

Use a balanced composition, scholarly calm mood, highly detailed ink linework, subtle watercolor shading, antique museum-print aesthetics, and a restrained palette of parchment tan, ink brown, faded blue, and muted charcoal. The overall feeling should be an intellectual tribute poster blending classical East Asian literati painting, philosophical portraiture, and contemporary AI safety themes.
